user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 сравни по часам среднее время подачи от принятия водителем до прибытия и среднее время поездки от старта до завершения только для завершённых заказов. Нужен line chart.

actual.clarification_question: Какое значение в поле status_order обозначает завершённый заказ?

clarification_transcript.question: Какое значение в поле status_order обозначает завершённый заказ?
clarification_transcript.answer: Считать завершённым status_order = 'done'. Фильтровать по order_timestamp = '2026-04-14'. Группировка по часам.

clarification_transcript.question: Какую метрику нужно посчитать: выручку, количество заказов или средний чек?
clarification_transcript.answer: Считать завершённым status_order = 'done'. Фильтровать по order_timestamp = '2026-04-14'. Группировка по часам.

intent.raw_prompt: Считать завершённым status_order = 'done'. Фильтровать по order_timestamp = '2026-04-14'. Группировка по часам.

actual.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('hour', order_timestamp) AS hour,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverarrived_timestamp - driveraccept_timestamp)) AS avg_accept_to_arrival_seconds,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp)) AS avg_start_to_done_seconds
FROM train
WHERE status_order = 'done'
  AND order_timestamp::date = '2026-04-14'
  AND driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverarrived_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverarrived_timestamp - driveraccept_timestamp)) AS avg_accept_to_arrival_seconds,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp)) AS avg_start_to_done_seconds
FROM train
WHERE
  status_order = 'done'
  AND CAST(order_timestamp AS DATE) = '2026-04-14'
  AND NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverarrived_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50

user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.
intent.metric: доля принятых, но не завершённых поездок

actual.sql:
SELECT
  driver_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL) AS accepted_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS not_completed_cnt,
  (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL)::numeric
   / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL), 0)) AS share_not_completed
FROM train
WHERE DATE(order_timestamp) = DATE '2026-04-14'
GROUP BY driver_id
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL) >= 20
ORDER BY share_not_completed DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  driver_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL) AS accepted_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS not_completed_cnt,
  (
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL), 0)
  ) AS share_not_completed
FROM train
WHERE
  DATE(order_timestamp) = CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  driver_id
HAVING
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL) >= 20
ORDER BY
  share_not_completed DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10

user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 покажи по часам количество созданных заказов, количество завершённых поездок и конверсию в завершение. Нужен line chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 покажи по часам количество созданных заказов, количество завершённых поездок и конверсию в завершение. Нужен line chart.

actual.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('hour', order_timestamp) AS hour,
       COUNT(*) AS created_orders,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS completed_trips,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS conversion_rate
FROM train
WHERE order_timestamp >= '2026-04-14'::date
  AND order_timestamp <  '2026-04-15'::date
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  COUNT(*) AS created_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS completed_trips,
  CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS conversion_rate
FROM train
WHERE
  order_timestamp >= CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND order_timestamp < CAST('2026-04-15' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50
